questions: famous classical music composers kon kon
Indian classical music vs Western classical difference
classical music er instruments ki ki
answers: Classical music is a broad term for Western art music spanning centuries — from Bach and Mozart to Beethoven and Tchaikovsky. It's known for complex compositions, orchestral arrangements, and emotional depth.
Classical music holo shatabdi ধরে cholte thaka orchestral music tradition. Beethoven er Symphony, Mozart er compositions — eishob classical music. Study, focus, ar relaxation er jonno onek popular.

Indian classical music includes Hindustani (North) and Carnatic (South) traditions based on ragas and talas. Western classical features symphonies, concertos, and operas. Both require years of dedicated practice to master.

Classical music isn't boring at all! Try Beethoven's 5th Symphony, Vivaldi's Four Seasons, or Tchaikovsky's 1812 Overture for exciting pieces. Studies show classical music can improve focus, reduce anxiety, and boost creativity.
